/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/test_package_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/test_package_msgs/msg/detail/aruco_marker__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/minibot/test_files_ros/build/test_package_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libtest_package_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
